QR Code

Edit short link

Dashboard

Help

How to use
  • Drag or click to upload a group QR code to the recognition area; it will be decoded and filled into the target URL automatically.
  • Enter the group name and short link name, choose an expiry date (or leave it empty), then click Add QR Link.
  • Manage added links below: edit, delete, and view or download the QR code.
Notes
  • Short link names may only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens.
  • You can set an expiry date; if not set, the link never expires.
  • You will be notified by email when a link expires.

QR Decode & Link Creation

Click or drag a QR image here

Decoded result (auto-filled into the target URL on the right)
